title: FermionModeFamily
description: A family of fermionic modes tracked across backgrounds, branches, and refinement levels, with chirality and conjugation invariants.

memberModeIds.description: Fermion mode IDs belonging to this family across all contexts

contextIds.description: Context IDs (background IDs, branch IDs) in which this family has members

meanEigenvalue.description: Mean eigenvalue across all member modes

eigenvalueSpread.description: Eigenvalue spread across all member modes

isStable.description: Whether the family is stable (all members matched with high confidence)

ambiguityCount.description: Number of ambiguous matches in this family's history

alignments.description: Alignment records tracing how modes were matched across contexts

familyClusterId.description: Generation/family cluster ID assigned by the clustering algorithm

meanChiralBalance.description: Mean chiral balance (R-L)/(R+L) across family members

chiralBalanceSpread.description: Standard deviation of chiral balance across family members

dominantChirality.description: Consensus dominant chirality: left, right, mixed, or ambiguous

isChiralStable.description: Whether the chirality profile is stable across contexts

conjugateFamilyId.description: Family ID of the conjugate partner family, if identified

pairingConsistency.description: Fraction of members that have a consistent conjugate partner assignment [0, 1]

isMajoranaFamilyCandidate.description: Whether this family is a candidate Majorana family (self-conjugate)

alignmentType.description: Alignment type: matched, birth, death, split, merge, avoided-crossing

confidence.description: Confidence level [0, 1]. Low confidence indicates ambiguity.

ambiguityNotes.description: Ambiguity notes if matching was ambiguous

featureDistance.description: Invariant feature distance. Lower = more similar.

aggregateScore.description: Weighted aggregate score. Higher = better match. Range [0, 1].

isMatch.description: Whether the aggregate score exceeds the matching threshold
